programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

programme.desc: Confronted with Australia's first Ebola case, the team races to uncover how patient zero—a U.S. Navy scientist—contracted the deadly virus, only to have their search complicated by a top-secret military research agency as two of their own fight for their lives.

programme.title: Cia (Season 1)
programme.desc: When a deeply embedded U.S. intelligence officer is detained in Hong Kong, Nikki insists on traveling there to bring him home. But when her cover is blown, the team must work tirelessly to get her back to New York.

programme.title: The Hunting Party (Season 1)
programme.desc: Bex and the team race to catch Mark Marsden, a handsome and charming serial killer who murdered three of his wives in cold blood.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug (Brad Pitt), an unlucky assassin determined to do his job peacefully, is on a mission that puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: When Terry McCaleb is called to a crime scene where his partners Detective Waller and Arrango are waiting for him, he can't imagine how events will unfold. Victims five and six of the latest series of murders await him, and on a wall is written in blood "McCaleb, fuck me if you can" and a number code. As Terry tries to avoid giving answers to the reporters, he encounters one with blood on his shoes. He will chase him but when he almost catches him, he suffers a heart attack and falls to the ground. The suspect approaches and looks at him and Terry shoots him in the fog he sees without knowing if he has really wounded him. 2 years later, Terry is going to have some tests after his heart transplant. His doctor, Dr. Fox, gives him the all-clear before the retired agent goes to his ship, where he meets Graciella Rivers. The woman wants to hire him to investigate the disappearance of her nephew: Raymond. He also tells him that the heart that Terry has received is from Graciella's own sister. The next day the retired agent will meet with his former colleagues, who show him a security tape of a small store where there has been a murder. Even though it is prohibited, Terry will go there to ask questions to begin his investigation until he comes to the conclusion that the store robbery and murder has to do with another that occurred recently. As the investigation continues, Terry's stress increases, causing his recent transplant to hurt more and more. But the murders are there and the former agent is convinced that he will be able to find a relationship between all of them that will bring to light the culprit. This Clint Eastwood film exists in the same universe as "The Innocent." But despite his most famous roles playing Dirty Harry and other cops, this FBI agent is the last of Clint's incarnations as a detective.

programme.title: El cobrador de deudas 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Temptation in Manhattan
programme.desc: After working hard at a Boston financial management company, as night falls, Kate returns home to her husband Richard, who has just lost his job, and their children. When Kate receives an assignment that requires her to travel frequently to New York, Richard gets a job, which further deteriorates family and marital life. To make matters worse, Jack, her charming new colleague, begins to attract her.

programme.title: Darrow y Darrow: El cuerpo del delito
programme.desc: Claire and Miles believe a convicted murderer is innocent and, a year after her imprisonment, begin investigating the case again.

programme.title: Regreso al futuro
programme.desc: Marty McFly is a teenager tired of his family. One day he receives a call from his friend Doc, a scientist whom everyone thinks is crazy, to show him his latest invention. It is a time machine that consists of a car powered by plutonium. Marty accidentally activates the machine, traveling back in time to 1955. In the past, Marty discovers his teenage parents and mistakenly avoids their first date. Marty must reunite his parents, convince Doc that he comes from the future and manage to travel back to the present. Initially, the role of Marty McFly was going to be played by Eric Stoltz. However, in the middle of filming, the directors fired Stoltz when they considered that he was not the right actor. Michael J. Fox, who had been an early choice, was committed to the show Family Ties at the time. However, after Stoltz's dismissal he was available to record the film and immediately accepted the role. Christopher Lloyd plays Doc. Lloyd initially turned down the role, but ultimately accepted it once he read the script. The film's director, Robert Zemeckis, along with the screenwriter, Bob Gale, had already been interested in the idea of ​​making a film about time travel. The final idea came after Gale reflected on the possibility of having become friends with his father if they had attended the same school. After Back to the Future, Robert Zemeckis directed other successful films such as Forrest Gump, Cast Away and Flight. The success of Back to the Future led to the production of a trilogy, as well as the creation of an animated series.

programme.title: Regreso al futuro II
programme.desc: Marty, his girlfriend Jennifer and Doc travel to the future, to the year 2015, to prevent the couple's son from being imprisoned for a problem with the law. However, the presence of the temporary travelers will cause a bigger problem than the one they intended to fix and things will become increasingly complicated. The problem begins when Marty buys a sports almanac with all the results of the competitions up to the year 2000, in order to make easy money when he returns to the past. As in the first part, Marty McFly and Doc are played by Michael J. Fox and Christopher Lloyd, respectively. However, two of the actors from the first part, Crispin Glover and Claudia Wells, did not participate in the second part. Crispin Glover, who played Marty's father in the first part, was replaced by Jeffrey Weissman, who used facial prosthetics to look as much like Glover as possible. For her part, Elisabeth Shue was in charge of replacing Claudia Wells, who in the first part played Jennifer, Marty's girlfriend. Although the first film was not intended to have a sequel, its box office success motivated Robert Zemeckis to film two more films. After two years spent building the sets and writing the script, filming began in February 1989. Without a doubt, the biggest challenge was creating the futuristic vision of Hill Valley. It should be noted that this second part and the third part of the trilogy were filmed simultaneously.

programme.title: Regreso al futuro III
programme.desc: Stranded in 1955, Marty receives a letter from his friend Doc telling him that he is in 1885 and that the time machine is broken and cannot be repaired. Doc isn't worried about being stuck in the past, saying he's happy working as a blacksmith. However, Marty discovers an old grave in which he reads that Doc died in 1885, and decides to go rescue his friend. Using the time machine Doc had hidden in 1955, Marty travels to the Wild West, where he discovers that his friend has run afoul of a gang of bullies and fallen in love with a teacher. Using technology from the time, Marty and Doc must find a way to return to the future. Since the second and third parts of the trilogy were filmed simultaneously, there are no significant changes in the cast with respect to Back to the Future II, with MartyMcFly and Doc again played by Michael J. Fox and Christopher Lloyd, respectively. The most notable addition compared to the previous installments is that of Mary Steenburgen, playing Clara Clayton, the teacher with whom Doc falls in love in 1885. The idea of ​​traveling back in time to 1885 arose during the filming of the first film, when Robert Zemeckis asked J. Fox what historical period he would like to visit. Fox answered that it was the Wild West, and Zemeckis and Bob Gale decided to use this idea for the third part. Although the first film was not intended to have a sequel, its box office success motivated Robert Zemeckis to film two more films. After two years dedicated to building the sets and writing the script, filming of the second and third parts (they were shot simultaneously) began in February 1989. Some scenes were filmed in Monument Valley. The train scenes were filmed at the Railtown 1987 State Historic Park, a historic train line located in Jamestown.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: Un joven jugador de Gran Turismo tiene la habilidad de ganar una serie de competiciones para convertirse en piloto de carreras profesional.

programme.title: El jurado
programme.desc: A young New Orleans widow files a civil lawsuit against a powerful corporate consortium whom she blames for her husband's death. Thus, a multimillion-dollar case is launched. Judicial thriller based on a novel by John Grisham, a best-selling writer who is well versed in all the ins and outs of United States law.

programme.title: Cazafantasmas
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: A very dangerous alien has escaped from the high-security prison on the Moon with the help of his exuberant admirer. The alien is called "Boris the Animal", a ruthless being that Agent K. captured in 1969 and whom they must face again. Unaware of Boris's escape, K. (Tommy Lee Jones) and J. (Will Smith) continue carrying out their work as M.I.B. agents. ridding the city of dangerous aliens or aliens with petty crimes. At the beginning of a new day, J. can't find his partner anywhere, but that's not the most worrying thing, no one at the agency seems to know of his existence. In his investigation he will realize that Boris has made a jump in time and has killed K. completely changing history and causing the Earth to be unprotected against an imminent alien attack. J. will have to travel back in time to recover his partner and save the future of the planet. Specifically, he will travel to the year 1969, when K. is still a young agent with a certain sense of humor. Together they will try to catch the evil Boris. To do this, they will have the intermittent and relative help of a character who is capable of seeing all the space-time lines of the Universe at every moment. The film began filming without a definitive script, so production was delayed due to all the rewrites that were done until it was completed. For the role of Boris, the participation of actor Sacha Baron Cohen, known for his leading roles in the films "Borat" and "The Dictator", was reconsidered. But in the end the role was awarded to Jemaine Clement. The makeup he wore to embody the alien took four and a half hours to apply each day of filming. Will Smith had his ups and downs with the film's director, Barry Sonnenfeld, because he wanted the person to play the role of the colonel's son to be his son, Jaden Smith, and not Cayen Martin, who ultimately got the role.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

programme.title: Le llaman Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: Crank: Alto voltaje
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Los cazafantasmas
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret Maverick is a poker player who, using all the tricks necessary, must get the money to participate in the biggest scam in the history of this game. To do this he must face a beautiful and cheating player, a group of Indians and endless obstacles.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: When Terry McCaleb is called to a crime scene where his partners Detective Waller and Arrango are waiting for him, he can't imagine how events will unfold. Victims five and six of the latest series of murders await him, and on a wall is written in blood "McCaleb, fuck me if you can" and a number code. As Terry tries to avoid giving answers to the reporters, he encounters one with blood on his shoes. He will chase him but when he almost catches him, he suffers a heart attack and falls to the ground. The suspect approaches and looks at him and Terry shoots him in the fog he sees without knowing if he has really wounded him. 2 years later, Terry is going to have some tests after his heart transplant. His doctor, Dr. Fox, gives him the all-clear before the retired agent goes to his ship, where he meets Graciella Rivers. The woman wants to hire him to investigate the disappearance of her nephew: Raymond. He also tells him that the heart that Terry has received is from Graciella's own sister. The next day the retired agent will meet with his former colleagues, who show him a security tape of a small store where there has been a murder. Even though it is prohibited, Terry will go there to ask questions to begin his investigation until he comes to the conclusion that the store robbery and murder has to do with another that occurred recently. As the investigation continues, Terry's stress increases, causing his recent transplant to hurt more and more. But the murders are there and the former agent is convinced that he will be able to find a relationship between all of them that will bring to light the culprit. This Clint Eastwood film exists in the same universe as "The Innocent." But despite his most famous roles playing Dirty Harry and other cops, this FBI agent is the last of Clint's incarnations as a detective.

programme.title: Temptation in Manhattan
programme.desc: After working hard at a Boston financial management company, as night falls, Kate returns home to her husband Richard, who has just lost his job, and their children. When Kate receives an assignment that requires her to travel frequently to New York, Richard gets a job, which further deteriorates family and marital life. To make matters worse, Jack, her charming new colleague, begins to attract her.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Becky Fuller, an energetic TV producer, is fired from her job, her professional life becomes as bleak as her love life. To move forward with his career, he must face a new challenge: launching a morning magazine show on a New York channel.

programme.title: El presidente y Miss Wade
programme.desc: Andrew Shepherd (Michael Douglas), president of the United States and widower for just over a year, begins a romance with Sydney Wade (Annette Benning), a consultant for an important environmental organization. This relationship, in the middle of the election campaign, will be taken advantage of by Bob Rumson (Richard Dreyfuss), the opposing candidate, to attack the president.

programme.title: The mask of Zorro
programme.desc: 1821. The Mexican army strives to liberate its country from the Spanish yoke. In the Californias area, the evil Spanish governor, Don Rafael Montero, is about to lose everything. In a last attempt to catch his nemesis, the masked swordsman "Zorro", Montoro prepares to murder three innocents. With the help of two orphans, Joaquín and Alejandro Murrieta, Zorro frees the prisoners. Then he will give both boys a special medallion and flee on his horse, Tornado, after marking Montero with a small "Z" on his neck as a warning. But that same night the soldiers enter the house of a nobleman named Don Diego de la Vega and arrest him since they are convinced that he is the real Zorro. Don Diego's wife dies, he is locked up in prison and his daughter, Elena, is taken to Spain as Montoro's daughter, where he will raise her as if she were his own. Twenty years later, Montoro secretly returns to California and looks for Diego in prison but cannot find him because he is unrecognizable due to age. However, the prisoner does remember the man and with a thirst for revenge like he had never had before, he escapes from prison and decides to put an end to his enemy forever. Along the way he will discover Elena, his daughter, who is as beautiful as her mother when she was murdered. Tired, old and completely destroyed by the years of captivity, Don Diego de la Vega will decide to train an adult Alejandro Muerrieta, now a bandit and rogue, to become the new Zorro and avenge all the suffering that the evil Rafael Montero caused him. At first Anthony Hopkins rejected the role of Don Diego de la Vega because he had unbearable pain in his back. When a laser operation managed to alleviate the problem, he then offered to accept playing the wise old "Zorro."

programme.title: La leyenda del Zorro
programme.desc: 1850. California has been tortured by the colonizers for years but will finally become the thirty-first state of the Union. Zorro suspects that a group of individuals intend to sabotage this decision for their own benefit, so he will stop them in a heroic feat. At the same time, McGivens, a French baron, is dedicated to blackmailing the inhabitants of California to keep their lands and leaving those who earned their living from the countryside in absolute poverty. Don Alejandro de la Vega, the one nicknamed "Zorro" with his mask, his sword, his horse and his cape, has finally been able to marry the beautiful Elena and has a ten-year-old son named Joaquín. The little boy misses his father, whom he hardly sees, and on the other hand idealizes the figure of his hero, Zorro, without knowing what his true identity is. Alejandro promises to leave the mask behind forever and dedicate himself to his family, but when a new crisis appears in California, he acts once again to solve it. Elena, feeling cheated, kicks her husband out of the house and presents him with divorce papers. At that moment, an old companion of the woman arrives at the scene: the French aristocrat Army. When he finds out about Elena's separation, he immediately begins to court her while attending to his affairs in the secret brotherhood in which he is involved. Now Alejandro will have to choose between alleviating the suffering of the oppressed or returning to his family. But to do so he must defeat the always shady Baron Army. For "The Legend of Zorro" both Steven Spielberg and Robert Rodriguez planned to direct the film, but in the end they did not take the job, although Spielberg did stay on as executive producer.

programme.title: La bella y la bestia
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: La fuente de la vida
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: Estado de sitio
programme.desc: Third collaboration between director Edward Zwick and Denzel Washington after "Glory Times (1989)" where he won his first Oscar for Best Supporting Actor and "In Honor of the Truth" (1996) and magnificent hand in hand full of tension between Denzel Washington and Bruce Willis. New York City becomes the target of a wave of terrorist attacks. FBI agent Anthony Hubbard (Denzel Washington) is appointed head of the joint anti-terrorist force and together with CIA agent Elise Kraft (Annette Bening), with important contacts in the Arab-American community, they will be in charge of arresting those responsible. Meanwhile, the government declares martial law and sends General William Deveraux (Bruce Willis) to command the troops in charge of occupying the city.

programme.title: El Fugitivo
programme.desc: Henry Fonda is a priest persecuted by the authorities after the government has banned religion. His decision is to flee to another country, but at the border he will have difficulty getting out and will have to disguise himself. The film, directed by John Ford, is based on a novel by Graham Greene.

programme.title: Night at the Museum: The Secret of the Pharaoh
programme.desc: In the natural history museum the statues come to life at night thanks to the Ahkmenrah tablet, which has great powers. Larry Daley, the night manager, discovers that the board is corroding and decides to ask a board expert in the London museum for advice. Larry will take several of his friends such as Roosevelt, Attila and Augustus Octavius ​​to the English capital.

programme.title: Los cazafantasmas
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Los cazafantasmas II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Cazafantasmas
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Elena Houghlin, programmer of a device that creates and controls a new form of energy, knows it has a dangerous flaw. Faced with her bosses' refusal to listen to her objections, Houghlin goes to the Townsend Agency.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: Noche de Venganza
programme.desc: Vincent is a divorced man with a teenage son, Thomas, with whom he barely has a relationship. He works as a police officer in Los Angeles, dealing with corrupt matters hidden from Internal Affairs. After a heist in which he steals a shipment of cocaine from a dealer in Las Vegas, Vincent and his partner Sean Cass volunteer to investigate the case in order to hide their guilt and involvement from Internal Affairs. One afternoon when Vincent is walking with his son, the group of criminals from whom he stole cocaine corners him and kidnaps Thomas, threatening to end his life if he does not return the drugs. The leaders of Internal Affairs suspect Vincent and decide to investigate him. He only has one night to get his son back safe and sound, return the drug shipment, hide the truth from his ex-partner and cleanse his image in front of the heads of Internal Affairs.

programme.title: El agente
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Upon returning from a mission in Mombasa, elite soldier Ray Garrison and his wife are kidnapped and murdered. Shortly after, Ray awakens in the Spirit Reborn Project facility with no memory of his past.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: AI Decoded examines a dramatic week for Elon Musk that could reshape the future of artificial intelligence. A US court has rejected Musk's claims against OpenAI, bringing a long-running feud with co-founder Sam Altman into sharp focus and offering a rare glimpse inside one of the world's most influential AI companies. At the same time, SpaceX is preparing for what could be the largest stock market listing in history - a move that may value the company at up to $1.75 trillion and make Musk the world's first human trillionaire.

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Shiona McCallum meets the medical expert testing out the future of prosthetics following his own near-fatal cycling accident. Paul Carter heads inside Amazon's AI chip lab in Austin, Texas. Zoe Kleinman visits the UK Dementia Research Institute to see how AI is being used to improve diagnosis and help find treatments. Harriet Bradshaw finds out how gym equipment is being invented and tested to help astronauts exercise in space.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: Richard Madeley in El Salvador's high-security prison, Matt Brittin's first days as BBC Director General, and the fallout from allegations linked to Married at First Sight.

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Shiona McCallum visits Fifa HQ in Zurich to see some of the new tech being used in the World Cup. Martin Sharkey explores how changes in the way we watch content are shaping new technologies. Paul Carter hits the racetrack to see if AI systems can make journeys safer. And Andrew Rogers meets the dogs being helped to walk and run again thanks to assistive mobility aids.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: Rachel gets into the swing of a cosmopolitan Riviera town, uncovering foodie gems in Nice's charming back streets. She meets some hip young French chefs cooking with bohemian flair at a small local bistro that prides itself on fresh seasonal produce with a cool laid-back vibe. She also visits a socca bar where she learns about the giant chickpea crépe, a speciality of the region. Back in London, Rachel cooks little socca cakes with ratatouille, confit cod with rainbow chard gratin and mini orange trifles with candied carrots.

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: The Road to Hope with Fergal Keane
programme.desc: BBC journalist Fergal Keane has spent 40 years witnessing the worst that humanity can do - genocide, war, and famine. So why is he full of hope? The answer lies in the extraordinary bravery he's encountered in the worst places. In this film, Fergal argues that despite the anxiety of the present, the world has real cause for hope.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: A global, topical weekly show that lifts the hood on the entertainment and news business. The Media Show explores the companies and personalities who command our attention, and how our perception of the world is shaped by their actions. From the streaming giants who entertain us, to the news outlets and social media platforms that inform and enrage us, The Media Show explains how the industry really works.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: The Travel Show meets Thor Pedersen - the man attempting to become the most travelled person in Denmark. Thor's already achieved the accolade of being the only human ever to have visited every country without flying, and now he's embarking on a new challenge - visiting 1,001 different regions across the globe over the course of his lifetime.

programme.title: The Smuggling Business: Undercover
programme.desc: Over the past two years, tens of thousands of migrants have crossed the English Channel in small boats from northern France, despite repeated promises by successive governments to stop the trade. This undercover BBC investigation reveals how people smuggling gangs are operating in plain sight inside a migrant camp in Dunkirk. It exposes a highly organised criminal marketplace driven by fierce competition between rival groups, who enforce control over the settlements through fear, violence and intimidation. The film examines efforts by UK authorities to disrupt and dismantle the criminal networks profiting from the crossings, and questions whether those measures are keeping pace with the scale and sophistication of the operation. BBC investigative reporter Josie Hannett also travels to Crowborough, where opposition to a new asylum seeker accommodation site has turned the town into a flashpoint in the national immigration debate. She asks whether current government policy is likely to deter future arrivals, or whether the UK is preparing for a future that will require many more such sites across the south east

programme.title: Mantan Pacarku Superhero
programme.desc: Seorang mahasiswa yang menyebalkan dan sok jagoan, tiba-tiba mendapatkan pacar yang ternyata seorang pahlawan super. Namun sang pacar ternyata luar biasa posesif dan memakai kekuatan supernya untuk meneror sang mahasiswa.

programme.title: Toko Kr.amat Bantal Mimpi Indah
programme.desc: Marina mendapat bantal mimpi indah dari toko KR. Amat. Bantal ini mempunyai khasiat jika digunakan saat tidur maka waktu bisa diputar kembali. Segala sesuatu yang menyangkut masa lalu dapat terulang dan yang diinginkan terwujud.

programme.title: Cintaku Tak Seindah FTV
programme.desc: Ada tetangga baru yang bikin Alya kepincut dengan ketampanannya. Ramzi, cowok ganteng dan keren itu bikin Alya penasaran. Alya seorang penulis FTV, kerap menulis cerita percintaan. Apakah kisah nyatanya bakal seindah cerita FTV?

programme.title: Toko Kr.amat Tikar Rogosukmo
programme.desc: Tikar Rogo Sukmo adalah selembar tikar yang bisa menyembuhkan orang sakit. Tikar ini bukanlah tikar sembarangan. Setiap orang yang sembuh setelah memakainya akan langsung dengan sukarela memberikan seluruh hartanya.

programme.title: Sunan Ampel Dan Nyi Ageng Manila
programme.desc: Sunan Ampel datang ke desa Kembang Kuning menyebarkan agama Islam. Untuk meredakan perseteruan Ki Bangkuning dan Ki Wiryo atas sebidang tanah, dia menanam singkong di tanah tersebut dan singkong itu ternyata menghasilkan emas

programme.title: Perjalanan Terlarang
programme.desc: Mala dan temannya merencanakan untuk berkemah di hutan belantara, tetapi Mala dilarang orang tuanya dan mereka tetap nekat. Sejak itu mereka terjebak di hutan yang jauh dari keramaian.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 4
programme.desc: Untuk keempat kalinya Indonesia kalah dari Malaysia di Kejuaraan Asia Tenggara. Mada, Ken dan Mpok Yagi berusaha mendaftarkan tim Indonesia untuk pertandingan berikutnya. Namun, mereka harus mencari lima anggota

programme.title: Mencari Pangeran Sepatu Basket
programme.desc: Miranda trauma dengan pria, hubungannya selalu gagal dan dia selalu dikecewakan. Untuk mengobati hati, Miranda pergi liburan dengan kapal pesiar. Tak di sangka di kapal pesiar itu Miranda justru berkenalan dengan Ibas

programme.title: Amoy Aku Cinta Kamu
programme.desc: Key, gadis keturunan Tionghoa yang kabur dari rumah dan menjalin hubungan dengan seorang pria. Ketika sang kekasih meninggalkannya dalam keadaan hamil, Key bertemu Handoko yang mengenalkannya pada cinta tanpa syarat.

programme.title: Dear Mantan
programme.desc: Vino akan kuliah ke luar negeri selama 4 tahun sehingga Bella menerima cinta Dirly, cowok keren dan kaya. Tiba-tiba Vino menghubungi Bella dan akan kembali ke Jakarta. Persoalan semakin keruh ternyata Dirly adalah saudara Vimo.

programme.title: Jodoh Di Ujung Jari
programme.desc: Rio, cowok tampan playboy kampus, banyak cewek-cewek terpikat oleh Rio. Rio punya empat pacar dan harus bisa mengatur waktu dengan keempat pacarnya. Apakah akan berjalan dengan mulus?

programme.title: Toko Kr.amat : Teko 1001 Malam
programme.desc: Rani, cewek cupu yang dirundung teman-temannya dan kerap mendapat perlakuan buruk. Ia juga diperlakuan kasar dari tantenya. Rani menemukan sebuah teko usang, ketika digosok keluarlah sosok jin yang bisa mengabulkan permintaan

programme.title: Pejantan Tanggung 02
programme.desc: Akhirnya keempat sahabat ini kembali bersatu dan melupakan kejadian di masa lalu. Ketika mereka saling terbuka tentang perasaan mereka, persahabatan mereka pun dipertaruhkan.

programme.title: Kesengsem Tukang Sedot WC
programme.desc: Dika, seorang tukang sedot WC yang tampan, yang terlibat masalah dengan atasan barunya, anak perempuan pemilik perusahaan yang ditugaskan untuk menyelidiki dugaan penyelewengan dana perusahaan.

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Pembalap Insyaf
programme.desc: Vivi harus menghidupi keluarganya dengan bekerja sebagai pembalap liar untuk Angga. Sementara Bayu adalah seorang polisi. Ketika balapan liar digerebek secara tiba-tiba. Vivi melarikan diri dan pingsan di sebuah musala.

programme.title: One-Armed Swordsman
programme.desc: Seorang pendekar pedang mulia, yang lengannya telah terpotong, kembali menemui gurunya yang dulu untuk melindunginya dari sekelompok pedangawan jahat yang menjadi rivalnya.

programme.title: Hidden Power Of Dragon Sabre
programme.desc: Dalam kisah ini, seorang penjahat bernama Sung Ching-shu kembali menebarkan terornya. Ia menjebak seorang putri Mongolia yang cantik dan menguasai ilmu 'gabungan yin dan yang' yang menjadikannya tak terkalahkan.

programme.title: The Mad Monk Strikes Again
programme.desc: Seorang biksu gila menghadapi cendekiawan legendaris yang berubah menjadi jin, Lu Tung Pin. Keduanya menyebabkan kekacauan saat bersaing satu sama lain, baik dalam kesenangan, sihir, wanita, atau senjata!

programme.title: The Sword And The Lute
programme.desc: Kwei Wu dan rekannya tengah melakukan sebuah misi untuk menghancurkan 'Phoenix Lute', sebuah senjata mematikan yang dapat menembakkan jarum-jarum beracun dan hanya dapat dihancurkan oleh pedang lengkung Kan.

programme.title: The Grand Substitution
programme.desc: Opera Huangmei yang epik ini dibintangi oleh Li Li-hua dan Ivy Ling Po dalam kisah tentang seorang pelayan Istana yang menyerahkan putranya yang baru lahir, demi menyelamatkan sang pangeran dari seorang pejabat jahat.

programme.title: Little Dragon Maiden
programme.desc: Yang Kuo jatuh cinta pada Gadis Naga saat tengah mempelajari seni permainan pedang. Namun, mereka tidak bisa menikah karena jalinan cinta antara guru dan murid adalah suatu hal yang terlarang.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Musik dan keajaiban dari The Singing Escort menjadi ajang untuk menampilkan daya tarik Betty Ting. Ting berperan sebagai Susan, seorang wanita muda yang bersembunyi dari ayahnya.

programme.title: The 5 Billion Dollar Legacy
programme.desc: Tiga gadis pergi ke Jepang untuk mengambil warisan yang tak terduga dan bertemu tiga pria dengan niat yang sama. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi untuk memperebutkan warisan tersebut.

programme.title: The Pearl Phoenix
programme.desc: Dalam tradisi Opera Huangmei, film ini menceritakan kisah cinta Wen, yang menjual dirinya sebagai budak ke sebuah keluarga kaya, dan Huo, seorang putri muda dari keluarga itu.

programme.title: Tropicana Interlude
programme.desc: Ping dan Su adalah sepasang kekasih yang mengelola agen perjalanan khusus liburan ke Asia Tenggara. Seorang kepala sekolah bernama Tung beserta murid-muridnya bergabung dalam tur yang dipimpin oleh Ping.

programme.title: Tropicana Interlude
programme.desc: Ping dan Su adalah sepasang kekasih yang mengelola agen perjalanan khusus liburan ke Asia Tenggara. Seorang kepala sekolah bernama Tung beserta murid-muridnya bergabung dalam tur yang dipimpin oleh Ping.

programme.title: Disciples Of The 36th Chamber
programme.desc: Sutradara film bela diri nan legendaris, Lau Kar-leung, menuai pujian saat menyutradarai film yang menampilkan Gordon Liu sebagai San Te si biksu berjubah emas seperti dalam film The 36th Chamber Of Shaolin.

programme.title: The Kingdom And The Beauty
programme.desc: Aktris muda Linda Lin Dai tampil memukau sebagai seorang gadis desa yang menjalin hubungan gelap dengan Kaisar Cheng-Te, pria yang ia cintai seumur hidupnya.

programme.title: Operation Lipstick
programme.desc: Seorang asisten profesor mencuri mikrofilm yang menyimpan rahasia reaktor nuklir nan baru ditemukan dan menjualnya ke suatu sindikat kejahatan. Namun, benda itu jatuh ke tangan penari klub malam dan seorang pencuri.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black
programme.desc: Berlatar pada masa kependudukan Jepang saat PD II, Tang Qi yang merupakan yatim piatu jatuh cinta dengan pemuda bernama Chang. Namun, cinta mereka dipenuhi tantangan, seperti tekanan keluarga hingga gejolak perang.

programme.title: Young Vagabond
programme.desc: Pengemis Su dan saudaranya berlatih tanpa henti demi mengalahkan seorang pencuri sadis yang dijuluki Sang Lipan.

programme.title: Song Of Orchid Island
programme.desc: Paul Chang Chung berperan sebagai Dr. Ho yang memutuskan untuk pindah ke sebuah pulau terpencil di lepas pantai Taiwan untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fox
programme.desc: Dalam film arahan sutradara Chang Cheh ini, Chin Siu Ho berperan sebagai Hu Fei, putra mendiang seorang pahlawan. Ia bertekad untuk melawan para pendekar pedang terkenal yang bertanggung jawab atas kematian orangtuanya.

programme.title: The Dream Of The Red Chamber
programme.desc: Film yang diadaptasi dari novel Dinasti Ching nan populer, kisah cinta yang menyentuh ini terbukti menjadi tantangan bagi banyak sineas film. Kombinasi klasik dari sastra abad ke-18 dan pembuatan film tahun 1960-an.

programme.title: Mist Over Dream Lake
programme.desc: Yen Chun menyutradarai dan membintangi film nan menyentuh yang berkisah tentang Chen, seorang gadis kecil yang dikirim oleh orangtuanya ke sebuah peternakan milik kerabat di suatu musim panas yang tak terlupakan.

programme.title: The Lady Is The Boss
programme.desc: Akademi milik Wong Hsia Yuan sang ahli kungfu tradisional hampir ditutup. Chan Mei Ling tiba dari Amerika Serikat untuk merevitalisasi akademi tersebut, tetapi caranya merekrut siswa melanggar hukum yang berlaku.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: Ibu Suri Cixi mempercayai pernyataan kelompok pemberontak penjajahan jika mereka kebal terhadap pisau dan senjata. Ia pun memutuskan untuk memanfaatkan mereka untuk mengusir penjajah asing dari Tiongkok.

programme.title: Na Cha The Great
programme.desc: Film klasik karya Chang Cheh yang diangkat dari kisah fantasi populer ini dibintangi oleh Fu Sheng dalam perannya yang khas sebagai remaja super Na Cha, yang bereinkarnasi untuk menyelamatkan penduduk dari kaisar kejam.

programme.title: Sex, Love And Hate
programme.desc: Dalam Sex, Love, And Hate, Chu Yuan menggabungkan bintang dari genre film kungfu dan film dewasa untuk mengangkat perbedaan pandangan masyarakat Hong Kong tentang cinta dan apa yang diinginkan wanita dari cinta.

programme.title: Two Champions Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Berlatarkan era Dinasti Qing, film ini berkisah tentang klan Shaolin yang ingin menggulingkan Qing dan memulihkan Dinasti Ming, sementara klan Wudang didukung oleh pemerintah Qing.

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: Film komedi ini bercerita tentang cinta terlarang dan senjata ajaib. Sepasang kekasih harus memperoleh kembali pedang titular dan membalas dendam atas pembunuhan yang terjadi di masa lalu mereka!

programme.title: Whose Baby is in the Classroom?
Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: Seorang seniman bela diri muda dan terpelajar ditugaskan oleh kaisar Qing untuk memata-matai para pembangkang di provinsi lain yang berencana untuk menggulingkannya. Ia menyusup ke perkebunan besar pemimpin pemberontak dengan menjadi guru privat cucunya.

programme.title: Two Con Men
programme.desc: Sebuah film komedi romantis yang dibintangi oleh Liang Tien dan Chang Yin, yang berkisah tentang perseteruan lama antara seorang penipu pemula dan seorang penipu yang telah berpengalaman.

programme.title: Ambitious Kung Fu Girl
programme.desc: Michelle Mei Suet berperan sebagai Szu-szu si gadis manja yang mengabaikan cinta sejatinya, Yang Fan, untuk mencari pendekar pedang pujaannya, Chin Ko.

programme.title: The Story Of Sue San
programme.desc: Wang adalah putra pejabat pemerintah yang dihormati, sedangkan Sue San adalah seorang wanita penghibur nan terkenal. Meskipun dan terlihat cocok dan saling mencintai, keduanya sangat berbeda dalam tingkatan sosial.

programme.title: A Place To Call Home
programme.desc: Saat mengetahui jika dirinya adalah anak adopsi, Li Ching pergi untuk mencari keluarganya. Ketika situasi yang dialaminya menjadi semakin memburuk, ia akhirnya menyadari bahwa rumah adalah tempat yang terbaik.

programme.title: The Golden Seal
programme.desc: Pasangan muda dan anak mereka hidup di pulau Aleusia yang terisolasi dari dunia luar. Seperti penduduk asli Aleusia yang lain, sang ayah telah lama memburu anjing laut emas yang selama ini dianggap sebagai mitos semata.

programme.title: Gorgeous
programme.desc: Seorang gadis romantis pergi ke Hong Kong untuk mencari cinta sejatinya, namun justru bertemu dengan seorang petarung profesional yang baik hati, dan perlahan ia pun mulai jatuh cinta kepadanya.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: Putra dari keluarga kaya jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita yang hanya akan menikahinya setelah ia menjadi seorang Guru Kung-Fu. Dalam 'Drama Komedi' ini, ia menjadi pahlawan legendaris dengan berusaha menyelamatkan kaisar, dalam pencarian cintanya yang sebenarnya.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: Face To Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu tewas dalam sebuah kecelakaan ski. Kemudian, teman sekamarnya, Yoshio, menikahi istrinya serta mewarisi seluruh kekayaannya. Namun, segalanya berubah sejak Yoshio bertemu seorang pria tua di pemakaman Tamotsu.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Seluruh sekolah disandera saat kompetisi pidato bahasa Inggris berlangsung. Ip Man pun memutuskan untuk bangkit dan menghadapi krisis, serta menemukan bahwa dalangnya adalah sang guru dan teman masa kecilnya.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 2
programme.desc: Perampok kuburan menemukan vampir yang diawetkan. Saat mengangkut vampir anak, mantra yang mengikatnya hilang, dan ia berteman dengan penduduk setempat. Vampir orang tua terbangun dan melarikan diri. Tabib herbal mengejar untuk menghancurkan mereka.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Gangster kejam Guts melakukan perampokan berlian, lalu meminta bantuan anggota triad lama, Fei, untuk mengatur pembeli. Namun ketika Guts mengkhianati pembeli, Fei malah mendapatkan berlian tersebut, dan dicari oleh polisi serta Guts.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: Mr. Possessed
programme.desc: Riley diberi kemampuan untuk menahan godaan dari lawan jenis namun hal itu menjadi beban ketika ia hendak menikahi kekasihnya.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng adalah seorang petarung jalanan yang memutuskan untuk hidup di Kowloon Walled City. Ia terlibat dalam perkelahian dan konspirasi. Saat temannya diburu oleh geng triad, Neng harus menyelamatkan temannya.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang tahun-tahun awal Republik Tiongkok, keluarga Kang yang kaya dibunuh secara brutal, dan putri kecil mereka satu-satunya saksi menghilang secara misterius.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang seorang pria yang mendapat sepucuk surat gaib tentang prediksi kematiannya, pria lainnya tengah berduka atas kematian sang istri tercinta, serta tiga kakak beradik yang berselisih saat makan malam.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: Sebelum memenangkan pujian dalam film laga berkat aksi-aksi mereka yang berani, para bintang ini menjalani tahun-tahun penuh darah, keringat, dan air mata saat berlatih di bawah bimbingan Master Yu yang kejam.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Bintang laga Chow Yun-Fat memerankan gangster sungguhan Chen Daqi saat ia naik ke eselon atas kekuasaan, mendapati dirinya terpecah antara cinta dua wanita, rencana pembunuhan dinas rahasia, dan ancaman perang yang membayangi.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang pemadam kebakaran yang rela menerjang bahaya dan mempertaruhkan nyawanya demi menyelamatkan orang lain. Akan tetapi, apakah ia memiliki keberanian untuk menghadapi masalah pribadinya?

programme.title: Skyline Cruisers
programme.desc: Petualangan aksi di mana formula obat penyembuh kanker dicuri, dan tim petarung kung-fu harus mengatasi saingan dan pengkhianatan untuk mendapatkannya kembali.

programme.title: Girl With The Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: Lily, adalah seorang gadis biasa yang menjalani kehidupan sederhana. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah pasar antik, dia menemukan sepasang sepatu kaca berlian yang indah. Tanpa disangka, sepatu ini ternyata memiliki kekuatan magis yang dapat mewujudkan impian dan memberikan keberuntungan. Ketika Lily mencoba sepatu tersebut, dia segera menemukan bahwa hidupnya mulai berubah drastis. Dia mendapatkan pekerjaan impiannya, bertemu dengan orang-orang penting, dan bahkan menarik perhatian seorang pangeran modern yang tampan.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri miskin, Shui dan Ti, berusaha membangun kehidupan mereka sendiri. Dan melalui kerja keras mereka berdua, Shui menjadi seorang eksekutif pemasaran, kemudian sikapnya mulai berubah.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: Seorang Pendeta Taois tidak senang ketika rekan Pendeta Buddha-nya pindah ke sebelah rumahnya. Mereka sering terlibat perselisihan dan duel, tetapi segera harus mengatasi masalah mereka ketika seorang vampir keluar dari peti matinya dan mendatangkan malapetaka di pedesaan.

programme.title: Behind The Yellow Line
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang pemalu dan pekerja kantoran, bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik dan ambisius yang sedang mengejar karirnya, serta seorang pria lain yang ramah namun penuh rahasia. Pertemuan ini membawa mereka ke dalam perjalanan emosional yang kompleks, penuh dengan kebingungan, kesalahpahaman, dan penemuan diri.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist: Chen Zhen
programme.desc: Tahun 1917, Chen Zhen, yang diyakini telah meninggal, kembali ke Shanghai dengan nama palsu. Dia bergabung dengan seorang bos mafia untuk mendapatkan informasi tentang Jepang, termasuk daftar panjang orang yang ingin dibunuh, dan pada malam hari melawan orang-orang Jepang bertopeng.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Long Wei mengalami gangguan pascatrauma usai kematian istrinya. Suatu hari, ia bertemu Amy yang bekerja di perusahaan teknologi VR dan diundang untuk menguji produk baru. Ia pun menjadi petarung VR perusahaan itu.

programme.title: Initial D
programme.desc: Selama lima tahun, Takumi yang berusia 18 tahun mengirimkan tahu setiap pagi dengan mengendarai Toyota AE86 kuno milik ayahnya. Ia pun mengembangkan teknik balap yang sempurna dan menjadi pembalap hebat.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: Seorang biksu ulung berusaha melindungi seorang dokter muda yang naif dari iblis ular berusia seribu tahun. Pertarungan kekuatan psikis berujung pada kekacauan.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Seorang badut secara tidak sengaja direkrut oleh seorang pemimpin sekte untuk memata-matai seorang kaisar Tiongkok yang muda dan tidak berpengalaman. Segalanya tidak berjalan sesuai rencana, dan dia akhirnya bekerja untuk beberapa pihak yang saling bertentangan sambil berusaha bertahan hidup di tengah kegilaan tersebut.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Selama invasi Jepang ke Cina, seorang seniman bela diri yang kaya terpaksa meninggalkan rumahnya ketika kotanya diduduki. Dengan sedikit sarana untuk memenuhi kebutuhan mereka sendiri, Ip Man dan anggota kota yang tersisa harus menemukan cara untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: Seorang penulis yang putus asa menjalin persahabatan yang tidak terduga dengan seorang remaja dari Long Island.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi akan mewarisi kekayaan kakeknya yang tengah sekarat dengan satu syarat, yaitu ia harus menikah dalam waktu sebulan. Jika tidak, warisan tersebut akan diberikan kepada sang paman yang bernama Robert.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: Marbles, seorang anak berusia 10 tahun, menyaksikan pembunuhan seorang wanita muda.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: Dunia berada dalam kekacauan setelah pohon kehidupan dibakar. Sun Wu Kong pun memutuskan untuk kembali ke masa lalu guna menghidupkannya kembali, tetapi kekuatannya tak stabil usai dirinya kehilangan ikat kepala emas.

programme.title: The Beckham Feud: Truth & Lies
programme.desc: One of the nation's favourite families is at war. But what's the truth behind the accusations? This documentary combs over Brooklyn Beckham's claims to find out what really happened in the House of Beckham.

programme.title: Playboy: The Centrefolds That Changed the World
programme.desc: Hugh Hefner, founder of Playboy, became an icon of 20th century pop culture. This documentary explores how, since his death, a darker take on what really went on in Hefner's Playboy has emerged.

programme.title: Homestead
programme.desc: Di tengah kekacauan, mantan Baret Hijau bergabung dengan kompleks persiapan; cinta tumbuh, kebenaran muncul, dan sebuah komunitas bersatu.

programme.title: The Young And Prodigious...
programme.desc: Seorang ilmuwan berusia 10 tahun diam-diam meninggalkan peternakan keluarganya di Montana tempat ia tinggal bersama ayah koboi dan ibunya ilmuwan, dan melakukan perjalanan melintasi negara dengan menaiki kereta barang untuk menerima penghargaan di Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Come Dance At My Wedding
programme.desc: Tanner Gray terkejut mengetahui setelah kematian mantan istrinya, Andrea, bahwa ia memiliki seorang putri berusia 25 tahun, Cyd. Ia dan istrinya bertemu di sebuah kapal pesiar lebih dari 25 tahun yang lalu, di mana keduanya bekerja sebagai instruktur tari. Mereka jatuh cinta dan menikah, tetapi sementara Andrea ingin menetap di kota kecil asalnya dan mengambil alih studio tari orang tuanya, Tanner berasal dari kota kecil dan ingin bepergian sebelum menetap.

programme.title: The Gridiron
programme.desc: Berdasarkan kisah nyata tahun 1985. Derek adalah seorang pemimpi dan pecundang. Seberapa keras pun dia berusaha, dia selalu gagal dalam segala hal yang dicobanya. Bertekad untuk menunjukkan kepada dunia bahwa dia bisa sukses dalam sesuatu, dia membentuk tim American Football di negara yang didominasi oleh sepak bola Amerika, rugby, kriket, dan ikan & kentang goreng. Keinginannya untuk sukses menguasai hidupnya dan dia buta untuk melihat bahwa kesuksesannya akan membuatnya kehilangan segalanya.

programme.title: Freetown
programme.desc: Sekelompok misionaris asli Liberia melakukan perjalanan lintas negara yang penuh keputusasaan melalui negara mereka yang dilanda perang untuk menyelamatkan salah satu dari mereka.

programme.title: Runt
programme.desc: Sekelompok siswa sekolah menengah atas terjebak dalam siklus kekerasan yang menurun.

programme.title: First Love
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah nan memilukan yang menampilkan sudut pandang seorang pemuda yang kesulitan dalam memasuki masa dewasa.

programme.title: The Farewell
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga Tionghoa mengetahui nenek mereka hanya punya sedikit waktu lagi untuk hidup dan memutuskan untuk merahasiakannya, menjadwalkan pesta pernikahan untuk diadakan sebelum ia meninggal.

programme.title: Hollywoo
programme.desc: Pengisi suara Prancis, Jeanne, mengisi suara aktris Amerika, Jennifer, dalam sebuah serial TV populer. Namun, ketika ia marah dan pensiun, dunia Jeanne runtuh.

programme.title: 10 Days With Dad
programme.desc: Antoine adalah Kepala SDM sebuah perusahaan besar. Ketika istrinya memutuskan untuk berlibur dan meninggalkannya dengan tanggung jawab mengasuh keempat anak mereka, ia tahu itu akan mudah.

programme.title: 10 Days With Dad
programme.desc: Antoine adalah Kepala SDM sebuah perusahaan besar. Ketika istrinya memutuskan untuk berlibur dan meninggalkannya dengan tanggung jawab mengasuh keempat anak mereka, ia tahu itu akan mudah.

programme.title: Direct Action
programme.desc: Frank Gannon, seorang polisi veteran, sedang diburu oleh rekan-rekan polisi setelah mereka mengetahui bahwa dia telah mengkhianati persaudaraan dan mengungkap korupsi skala besar FBI di LAPD. Dia punya satu hari tersisa untuk membuktikan kasusnya dan bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Lost Outlaw
programme.desc: Sebuah kamp penambangan emas di Tiongkok diserbu oleh sekelompok penjahat. Salah satu penjahat tersebut harus mempertanyakan moralnya setelah bertemu dengan wanita impiannya.

programme.title: An Evergreen Christmas
programme.desc: Meninggalkan kehidupan Hollywood-nya yang tampaknya glamor, Evergreen Lee terpaksa kembali ke kampung halaman kecilnya di Balsam Falls, Tennessee dan pertanian pohon Natal milik keluarganya yang pernah berkembang pesat untuk menghadiri pemakaman ayahnya.

programme.title: Illusion
programme.desc: ILLUSION adalah film tentang manusia, keinginan, ketakutan, harapan, dan kerinduan mereka. Sekilas di balik kesibukan rutinitas sehari-hari.

programme.title: Hope Springs Eternal
programme.desc: Ketika Hope Gracin yang berusia 18 tahun tiba-tiba mendapati dirinya dalam masa remisi dari kanker stadium akhir, ia harus belajar untuk hidup tanpa tanggal kedaluwarsa.

programme.title: High Rise Life The Movie
programme.desc: Selama bertahun-tahun, sekelompok teman telah melakukan perjalanan musim panas tahunan ke Laholm. Tahun ini, mereka ingin pergi ke tempat lain, setidaknya semua orang kecuali Ulf, yang memaksa yang lain untuk ikut dalam perjalanan tersebut - dengan mengatakan bahwa dia mengidap kanker.

programme.title: Shadow Wolves
programme.desc: Seorang agen NSA nakal bergabung dengan kelompok elit pelacak penduduk asli Amerika yang menyebut diri mereka Serigala Bayangan saat mereka terlibat dalam misi untuk melindungi keadilan di Amerika dan luar negeri.

programme.title: Thunder Run
programme.desc: Charlie, seorang veteran Perang Korea, sedang mengemudikan truk yang mengangkut plutonium dari Nevada ke Arizona. Namun, ada sekelompok teroris yang ingin mencuri barang tersebut...

programme.title: The Skeleton's Compass
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman sekolah menengah pertama pergi berburu harta karun setelah menemukan kerangka di hutan.

programme.title: Clowntergeist
programme.desc: Emma, seorang mahasiswi yang memiliki ketakutan yang hebat terhadap badut, harus berhadapan langsung dengan ketakutan terburuknya saat roh jahat dalam tubuh badut dipanggil untuk meneror kota yang ia sebut sebagai rumahnya.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: Whispering Shadows: Watcher
programme.desc: Seorang perantara dari sebuah organisasi kriminal disewa oleh seorang bos kriminal untuk melindungi putrinya selama perjalanan ke kota untuk merayakan ulang tahunnya.

programme.title: Midnighters
programme.desc: Pernikahan mereka sudah dalam masalah. Kemudian datanglah kecelakaan dan keputusan-keputusan buruk. Semua masalah mereka menjadi jauh lebih buruk.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: When English Football Ruled Europe
programme.desc: Two-part documentary series examining the years between 1977 and 1984 when three English football clubs - Liverpool, Nottingham Forest and Aston Villa - lifted the European Cup a record seven times. Featuring interviews with the stars of the victorious teams, the series reveals the remarkable stories behind the triumphs and explains how some of the most colourful characters in the game mastered Europe's foremost club competition. This part covers the break-up of Brian Clough's hugely successful Nottingham Forest, the re-emergence of Liverpool - who lifted their third and fourth European Cups in 1981 and 1984 - and the incredible story of Aston Villa, who upset all the odds to claim their one and only win in the competition in 1982.

programme.title: Soccer Aid: More Than Just A Game

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: On the sweeping sands of Benone Strand, Dermot rolls up his trousers and wades into the sea to harvest water for salt-making. Guided by Clare from Mussenden Salt, he learns the traditional process of creating sea salt over an open fire right on the beach. Embracing ancient Irish traditions, they host a clan-style cookout, roasting meat, cheese, and vegetables over open flames as previous generations once did. Travelling on to Coleraine, Dermot joins local lobster fisherman Peter, heading out onto the water to haul in pots. With fresh lobster secured, Dermot visits LIR Seafood Restaurant, where husband-and-wife team Rebekah and Stevie champion a zero-waste approach to cooking. In the kitchen, Dermot gets hands-on, learning to prepare indulgent lobster rolls while discovering how thoughtful cooking can turn every part of the catch into something delicious.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Cult adventure comedy. The community of the peaceful coastal town of Goon Docks, Oregon faces imminent foreclosure to make way for a golf course when a band of local childhood friends calling themselves the Goonies stumble upon an old map - the map provides secret clues leading to the fabled treasure of a notorious pirate known as One-Eyed Willy and sets in motion a wild mission to save their homes. With the criminal Fratelli family hot on their trail, a frantic race against time begins...

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Arriving in Derry at the end of the Causeway Coastal Route, Dermot finds a city rewriting its story, with the River Foyle as its beating heart. At the Walled City Brewery - once Army Barracks during the Troubles - he uncovers a secret local ingredient behind their standout brews. For a fresh perspective, Dermot hits the water with kayak instructor Michelle, paddling the Foyle and taking in the skyline from a whole new angle - equal parts scenic and splashy. Back on land, things get fiery on a double-decker bus-turned-taco joint. At Pyke 'N' Pommes, local legend Kevin Pyke blends bold Mexican flavours with top-notch Irish seafood. Dermot gets hands-on, prepping calamari and building tasty tacos that capture Derry's evolving food scene.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: John Nettles makes his final appearance as DCI Tom Barnaby - with his birthday approaching, Tom reluctantly accompanies his wife Joyce on a spa weekend to Swavely Manor. The atmosphere at the spa is far from tranquil as owner Phoebe Archbold has fallen out with her old friend and wannabe novelist Miranda Bedford - when a woman is found dead in the flotation chamber, Barnaby calls in DS Jones to lead the investigation. Seeking refuge at the village pub, Barnaby learns that Phoebe married Luke after the sudden death of her first husband and Miranda's friend Carter Smith reveals he is helping her with her novel although many in the village doubt that the book really exists - back at the spa, Luke is crushed to death by a training machine soon after being threatened by Carter. After another gruesome discovery, the truth gradually emerges - as the net closes in on the killer, all Barnaby has to worry about is his birthday party, retirement, and welcoming cousin DCI John Barnaby to Causton.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the novels by Ann Cleeves. After two young people are killed in the same way - drowned and surrounded by flowers - DCI Vera Stanhope knows that she must catch the murderer before they strike again. Aided by her team, especially her trusted right-hand man Sergeant Joe Ashworth, she unpicks the complex and dysfunctional relationships amongst a group of bird-watching friends. As the friends' loyalty turns to betrayal, Vera finds that a small act of teenage blackmail and an illicit affair may have driven someone to kill.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When an old friend of Hathaway's takes their own life, Lewis investigates a link between him and a religious group known as The Garden that he suspects are brainwashing their congregation - however, a serial killer also knows about the organisation and has started to pick off its members one by one, leaving Lewis with only so much time to solve the case before another victim is murdered.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Return of the drama series following two Manchester police officers. Newly-wed Rachel struggles to adjust to living with Sean. Admitting their marriage is over, Janet and Ade put their house on the market, planning to split when it sells. When she is called to a crime scene, Janet discovers the severed head of 75-year-old Eunice Bevan at the bottom of the stairs in her home, with her bedridden husband Joe lying upstairs. Tracing their relatives becomes crucial, but as Joe becomes more lucid in hospital, their daughter Helen's alibi starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series following two Manchester police officers. The Police Complaints Commission pick up the baton, and Rachel is once again under scrutiny. Struggling to cope, she finds comfort in the ever-faithful Sean and agrees to marry him. Amid the wedding celebrations Janet and Ade admit defeat about their marriage. As Gill gives Rachel her blessing and heads home, she disturbs Pete having sex in the car park. Businessman Adam Armitage shoves a homeless man, not realising he has killed him. So why is he running away?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Neil Dudgeon's first appearance as the head of Causton CID. John Barnaby initially rebuffs a request from Harriet Wingate, headmistress at the upmarket Darnley Park Girls School, to patrol their forthcoming classic car show, but Barnaby is intrigued when he learns that the remains of famous racing driver Duncan Palmer have been discovered at Darnley Park 40 years after he was thought to have drowned in the Lake District. Harriet is opposed to the plans of school governor Jamie Cameron and so invites his ex-wife Kate together with her father, racing legend Peter Fossett, to the show - Fossett is annoyed that his fellow judge is club DJ Dave 'Doggy' Day, who knows nothing about cars. Soon afterwards, Doggy is crushed to death under Kate's car and Barnaby thinks the video diaries of two pupils could hold clues to the killing, but a new lead takes him to meet someone at the barn where Duncan Palmer met his death. When the killer turns on him, could Barnaby's first case also be his last?

programme.title: Heartbeat
